indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space may lead to distractions and lack of privacy.

indicators.name: Marble floor
indicators.rationale: The marble floor is clean and polished, but does not provide any specific support for computer work.

indicators.name: Yellow lighting
indicators.rationale: The yellow lighting provides a pleasant ambiance and can help reduce eye strain.

reasoning_summary: The space is large and open, which may not be conducive to focused computer work. However, the lighting is positive and can help create a comfortable environment.
